Mdtero Extension

Use website OAuth for sign-in, review quota, and manage browser capture, upload, translation, and download settings.

Not signed in with website OAuth.

Balance and quota not loaded.

1OAuth 2Parse / Upload 3Translate 4Download

Connection guide

Website sign-in

The extension opens mdtero.com/auth for OAuth sign-in and receives the token through the trusted website bridge.

Extension + CLI handoff

Use the extension for browser context. When a publisher challenge, campus login, or saved file blocks capture, continue in the Python CLI.

mdtero doctor --json

The extension does not install Python dependencies or store publisher API keys.

CLI setup checklist

The Python client handles local acquisition, project queues, Zotero, backend Voyage RAG, MCP, and agent skills.

Python / uv
Advanced

Why Mdtero asks for these permissions

`tabs` lets the extension reuse or open supported paper pages for local capture.

`downloads` saves Markdown files, translations, fallback ZIPs, and source files back to your own machine.

Browser capture reuses the active tab only when you ask Mdtero to parse the current paper page.

Host permissions stay limited to Mdtero Account, supported scholarly pages, and files you choose to upload.

Document History

Downloads from your history are always free.
